layout: null
permalink: /llms.txt
---
# OpenAgent

> The open-source Claude Code alternative — an agentic coding CLI that works with any AI provider. Use your existing Claude Max subscription, OpenRouter, GPT-5, Gemini, Grok, Ollama, LM Studio, MLX, or any of 12+ providers, all from the terminal. Apache 2.0 licensed.

OpenAgent reads files, writes code, runs commands, searches the web, and ships features autonomously. It is a multi-provider, terminal-native AI coding agent that works with both cloud APIs and local model runtimes. Built in TypeScript with React + Ink for the terminal UI.

## Documentation

- [Home](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/): What OpenAgent is, install commands, value props
- [Quickstart](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/essentials/quickstart): Install, first run, common shortcuts in under two minutes
- [Install](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/essentials/install): macOS (brew), Linux/WSL (curl), from source, requirements, update flow
- [Permission modes](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/essentials/permissions): Standard, Cautious, Unrestricted — when to use each, per-tool rules

## Providers

- [Providers overview](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/providers): All 12+ providers (cloud + local), switching with `/provider` and `/model`
- [Ollama](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/providers/ollama): Local model runtime, auto-install, curated model list, M5 Metal bug workaround
- [LM Studio](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/providers/lmstudio): GUI + CLI runtime, GGUF models, OpenAI-compatible local server
- [MLX](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/providers/mlx): Apple Silicon native runtime, fastest on M-series, Gemma 4 support

## Plugins

- [Plugins](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/plugins): Bundled plugins that extend the agent with specialised tools (lint runner, test runner, stack trace resolver, dep audit, git blame, snapshot rollback, env var checker)

## MCP

- [MCP servers](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/mcp): Curated Model Context Protocol catalog — filesystem, git, github, postgres, sqlite, puppeteer, fetch, brave-search, slack, memory

## Reference

- [Commands](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/reference/commands): All 70+ slash commands (general, conversation, session, config, permissions, tools, files, shell, dev, git, workflow, UI, bridges, social, utility)
- [Keybindings](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/reference/keybindings): Every keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+T terminal mode, Shift+Tab permission cycle, ↑/↓ history, Esc, etc.)
- [Settings](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/reference/settings): `~/.openagent/config.json` schema, all stored files, environment variable overrides

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/ask-sol/openagent): Source code, issues, releases (Apache 2.0)
- [Homebrew formula](https://github.com/ask-sol/homebrew-openagent): macOS install tap

## Optional

- [Quickstart shortcuts](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/essentials/quickstart#4-common-shortcuts): Just the keyboard cheatsheet
- [Provider list at a glance](https://ask-sol.github.io/openagent/providers#cloud-providers): Just the comparison tables
